water.name: San Mateo Creek and tributaries downstream from the falls between the Tenaja Road crossing and Fisherman's Camp
aliases: San Mateo Creek (San Diego and Riverside Cos.)

authorities.name: California Department of Fish and Wildlife

sources.title: CCR T14 §7.40(b)(95) — San Mateo Creek and tributaries downstream from the falls between the Tenaja Road crossing and Fisherman's Camp (San Diego and Riverside Cos.)
sources.quotedText: (95) San Mateo Creek and tributaries downstream from the falls between the Tenaja Road crossing and Fisherman's Camp (San Diego and Riverside Cos.). Closed to all fishing all year.

sources.title: California Fish and Game Code §7145 — Sport Fishing License Requirement
sources.quotedText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

parameters.note: Closed to all fishing all year on San Mateo Creek and tributaries downstream from the falls located between the Tenaja Road crossing and Fisherman's Camp. This segment holds a genetically native, wild population of the endangered Southern California steelhead, the only such population south of Malibu Creek.

regulations.humanSummary: Closed to all fishing all year
regulations.verbatimText: Closed to all fishing all year.

parameters.note: Anglers 16 years of age or older must have a valid California sport fishing license.

regulations.humanSummary: California sport fishing license required for anglers 16+
regulations.verbatimText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...
